# T-056: MDI case creation + questionnaire submission without local answer retention

Generated from `docs/external/MD Integrations API.postman_collection.json`. The raw Postman collection remains authoritative; use this pack as a retrieval guide, not as a replacement for source verification.

Use partner questionnaire and case endpoints to submit answers directly to MDI. Apoth may retain only MDI case/submission pointers and onboarding status.

## Endpoint Matrix

| Operation | Method | Path | Surface | Ticket purpose | Required local persistence | Forbidden local persistence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [partner-post-partner-cases-create-case](../operations/partner-post-partner-cases-create-case.md) | POST | /partner/cases | partner | Use partner questionnaire and case endpoints to submit answers directly to MDI. Apoth may retain only MDI case/submission pointers and onboarding status. | Required local persistence: MDI patient ID, MDI case ID, optional MDI submission/status pointer, idempotency key, onboarding status, and timestamps. | Forbidden local persistence: questionnaire answers, case question text/answers, clinical notes, medication directions, prescription/order details, or raw MDI case payloads. |

## Thin-PHI Notes

- Required local persistence: MDI patient ID, MDI case ID, optional MDI submission/status pointer, idempotency key, onboarding status, and timestamps.
- Forbidden local persistence: questionnaire answers, case question text/answers, clinical notes, medication directions, prescription/order details, or raw MDI case payloads.
- Do not put PHI, clinical content, questionnaire answers, or MDI payload fragments in Stripe metadata or logs.
- Prefer `partner` and `webhook` routes. Internal/admin/test/unknown routes are default-deny unless a future ticket explicitly justifies them.

## Source Provenance

- `partner-post-partner-cases-create-case`: Partners / Cases / Create case
- `partner-get-partner-cases-case-id-get-case`: Partners / Cases / Get case
- `partner-post-partner-cases-case-id-questions-post-case-question`: Partners / Cases / Questions / Post case question
- `partner-get-partner-cases-case-id-questions-get-case-questions`: Partners / Cases / Questions / Get case questions
- `partner-get-partner-questionnaires-list-questionnaires`: Partners / Questionnaires / List questionnaires
- `partner-get-partner-questionnaires-questionnaire-id-get-questionnaire`: Partners / Questionnaires / Get questionnaire
- `partner-get-partner-questionnaires-questionnaire-id-questions-list-questions`: Partners / Questionnaires / Questions / List questions
